case_title: MARY ROSE VILLA VS. AMERICAN SEWING AND VACUUM CENTER CORP. A CALIF.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLA, MARY ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SEWING AND VACUUM CENTER CORP. A CALIF. CORP AKA NEECHI INTERNATIONAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLA, MARY ROSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SEWING AND VACUUM CENTER CORP. A CALIF. CORP AKA NEECHI INTERNATIONAL $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $99.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,899.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
